title: Add AMD ROCm support + Micro-MoE architecture for parameter golf
author: rav-lad
body:
- Replace flash_attn_3 with SDPA fallback for AMD GPUs
- Add NO_COMPILE env var to disable torch.compile on ROCm
- Support single-GPU mode (WORLD_SIZE=1) without torchrun
- Add Micro-MoE: top-1 gated mixture of experts in last N layers (MOE_LAST_N, MOE_NUM_EXPERTS env vars)
- MoE doubles MLP capacity without doubling compute per token
- Auxiliary load balancing loss for expert utilization
- Flexible unbank/rebank for MoE bank structure
- NCCL -> GLOO fallback for AMD distributed
- rocm-smi fallback for GPU info logging

https://claude.ai/code/session_012sim7aHkcsKwUJ44FckN36
